Grid.TextBlock:
SECRET
1. Fishermen and research vessels in the Xisha Islands report being harassed by Republic of Vietnam Navy (RVNN) combat vessels. Yesterday, Vietnamese forces landed at Robert Island after shelling our flag erected there. More Vietnamese naval forces and commandos have been reported moving into the islands. This is a breach of our territorial rights and command has ordered the South Seas Fleet to sortie at once to drive them away.
2. 1st Surface Attack Force will enter the Crescent Group ahead of the 2nd Surface Force. Locate and identify the Vietnamese forces there, but do not fire unless fired upon.
3. Vietnamese forces consist of 1 x ex-US EDSALL class destroyer, with 76mm guns, 2 x ex-US BARNEGAT class frigate with 127mm guns, and 1 x ex-US minesweeper with light cannon. These ships outrange us so it is advised to get in close and use our fast firing guns to silence them. Our anti-submarine mortars will be deadly against these ships and their use is recommended, if hostilities break out.
4. Move into the area, do not cause trouble, do not open fire first, and do not get the worst of it. Good luck and good hunting.
SECRET
